MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: Michael S. Rossoff, Esq. for plaintiff Tenderloin Neighborhood Development Corp. with property manager, Dean Turkalj present.
Dunnington M.R. Babb, Esq. appearing on limited scope representation for defendant Paul Christians, who is also present.

This cause comes on regularly for settlement conference. Settlement discussions held. The case settled. Parties enter into a signed Stipulation for Entry of Judgment or for Dismissal of Action with Prejudice, which is not filed. Trial date vacated.
